title: Polygon Bridge Fees - Open App
meta_description: polygon bridge fees: check gas, route estimates, and wallet approvals in Polygon Portal before opening the official bridge app.
hero_h2: Estimate gas before moving assets between Ethereum and Polygon
hero_lead: polygon bridge fees are shown before you confirm, so you can compare Ethereum gas, Polygon Chain gas, route timing, and wallet approvals before opening the official bridge app.
what_is: Polygon Portal is the official asset management interface for bridging, swapping, and monitoring tokens between Polygon Chain and Ethereum, with the native bridge described in the Polygon Portal docs as trustless and two-way. Fees are not a fixed headline number; the live wallet prompt and route quote are the source of truth before signing.

how.d: Go to the official Portal bridge route and verify the domain before connecting a wallet.
Select Ethereum or Polygon Chain, pick the token, enter the amount, and review the estimated arrival details.
Check source-chain gas, destination-chain gas, token approvals, and any third-party route details before signing.
Approve only in your wallet, then use the Portal transaction view to monitor status or claim when required.

points.p: Ethereum and Polygon Chain gas move with network demand; Polygon Gas Station publishes current Polygon Chain recommendations.
Deposits from Ethereum and withdrawals back to Ethereum can require different transactions, so compare the full route before confirming.
Open Portal directly from the official domain, avoid sponsored lookalikes, and never sign an unexpected approval.

faq.a: They are the live costs shown before signing, usually including network gas, token approval transactions when needed, and route-specific costs surfaced by the app or wallet.

faq.q: Does Polygon Portal charge a fixed bridge fee?
faq.a: Do not rely on a fixed number. The amount can change by route, token, direction, gas market, and whether a wallet approval or claim transaction is required.

faq.q: Why do bridge costs change between Ethereum and Polygon Chain?
faq.a: Both networks price transactions dynamically. Polygon Chain uses EIP-1559 style fee fields, while Ethereum gas can be the larger variable during busy periods.

faq.q: Can I reduce costs before bridging?
faq.a: You can compare routes, avoid urgent gas settings, bridge during calmer network periods, and check whether your token already has an approval before submitting.

faq.q: Where should I bridge Polygon assets safely?
faq.a: Use the official Portal at portal.polygon.technology, verify the URL, and confirm every wallet prompt before signing.

footer_note: Not the official app; verify portal.polygon.technology before connecting; educational content only, not financial advice.
